description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript proficiency by testing knowledge of language features ranging from ES2015 to ES2022 through multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned as a casual, self‑paced challenge with a light‑hearted tone, suitable for developers who want to gauge their modern JavaScript skills. The difficulty is moderate, assuming familiarity with core syntax and newer language enhancements.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2020–ES2022 updates, Modern JavaScript syntax, Language enhancements and new APIs
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript engineers, and web programmers looking to validate or refresh their knowledge of recent ECMAScript standards.
